text.title: Embedding Batch + Cache Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure from rate-budget + corpus to validated batch+cache config.

step.name: size-the-batch
step.input: Provider id; provider hard limit; per-input avg tokens.
step.action: Set batch.size = min(provider_limit, optimal_for_token_budget). For OpenAI 2048; Voyage 128; Cohere 96.

step.name: compute-concurrency
step.action: concurrency = min(floor(rpm / 60), floor(tpm / (batch.size * avg_tokens_per_input * 60))). Cap at 64.

step.name: pick-cache-backend
step.action: Single worker → SQLite. Multi-worker → Redis. Ephemeral CI → memory. Cache key_scheme = sha256-text-model-dim. TTL = 30 days for stable text, 1 day for chat-history snippets.

step.name: enable-dedup-and-order
step.action: Wrap call site: (a) dedup inputs by cache key; (b) carry input index; (c) reassemble in input order. Set dedup=true, preserve_order=true.
step.output: Updated producer; integration test verifying order + dedup.

step.name: validate-and-commit
step.action: Emit JSON per content/02-output-contract.xml. Run scripts/validate-embeddings-batch-and-cache.py. Commit alongside producer code.

text.reference: Reference implementation with all 5 rules wired.
